public_status: structural architecture integrated conditional; numerical closure open

axioms.statement: BHSM modes are physical boundary-local fields on the boundary geometry; sector projectors act on those fields and determine admissible couplings and responses.
CP O_int is represented by the CP/Z6 boundary holonomy and its phase attachment to admissible CKM, PMNS, or sector structures, not by a required standalone production vertex.
X_ch maps projector-selected physical charged boundary fields and currents to charged boundary-current response.

definitions.field_representation: charged boundary-response operator on physical BHSM boundary fields
definitions.coupling_normalization: operator normalization inherited from C_ch_boundary; no 4D production coupling claimed
definitions.operator_mass_dimension: boundary-response dimension fixed only within the boundary action
definitions.variation: delta S_charged_response / delta J_ch = X_ch(P_ch Psi_boundary)
definitions.production_rule: physical boundary field -> P_ch -> X_ch -> charged-current response

axioms.statement: The primary BHSM neutrino mass observable is a propagation-conditioned curvature response of the neutral boundary field; the BHSM contribution vanishes for a non-propagating state.

definitions.threshold_condition: curvature response reaches the neutral propagation threshold
definitions.dirac_majorana_role: secondary comparison/export convention, not the primary theorem target
definitions.observable_map: neutral boundary propagation -> curvature-threshold response -> effective neutrino mass observable
